hero.subtitle: Country Farms lets you invest in productive agricultural land — and the communities that depend on it. Real returns, real impact.
hero.caption: Farmland Photography

whyFarmland.heading: Why Farmland?
whyFarmland.intro: Farmland has consistently outperformed other asset classes — with the added benefit of real community impact.

stats.label: Historical Returns
stats.desc: Farmland has delivered 12.1% average annual returns over 20 years — outperforming equities and bonds through every market cycle.

stats.label: Inflation Hedge
stats.desc: During high-inflation periods, farmland values have historically risen 3× faster than consumer prices, protecting your purchasing power.

stats.label: Real Asset
stats.desc: Unlike stocks, farmland doesn't crash overnight. It's a productive, physical asset that generates food and income every single season.

communityImpact.heading2: We invest in the people around it.
communityImpact.body: Every Country Farms property is paired with a community development program. We partner with local farmers, fund agricultural education, and build the supply networks that help rural economies grow stronger together.

howItWorksPreview.heading: How It Works
howItWorksPreview.intro: Three simple steps from sign-up to your first quarterly distribution.

steps.title: Browse Properties
steps.desc: Explore vetted farmland opportunities with transparent financials, soil data, and community impact reports for each property.

steps.title: Invest Your Amount
steps.desc: Start with as little as $1,000. Choose the farm that fits your goals and complete your investment in minutes.

steps.title: Earn & Grow Impact
steps.desc: Receive quarterly distributions from farm income, track your portfolio performance, and watch your community impact grow.

featuredProperties.heading: Featured Properties
featuredProperties.intro: Each property is independently vetted for soil quality, water rights, and community partnership potential.

testimonials.heading: What People Are Saying
testimonials.intro: From investors to the farmers on the ground.

items.quote: I never thought I'd be a farmland investor. Country Farms made it simple to understand, easy to get started, and I love knowing exactly where my money is working — growing real food for real communities.
items.name: Sarah K.

items.quote: The partnership with Country Farms has transformed our operation. We've upgraded our irrigation, hired two more full-time staff, and connected with a community of investors who genuinely care about what we grow.
items.name: Tom Harrelson

ctaBanner.body: Join 2,400+ investors already growing their portfolios — and their communities — through Country Farms.

footer.tagline: Invest in the land. Grow the community. Real returns from productive farmland, with real impact for rural America.

newsletter.heading: Stay in the Loop
newsletter.body: Get market insights and new property alerts in your inbox.

footer.disclaimer: Country Farms is not a registered investment adviser. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Investing involves risk including possible loss of principal. For informational purposes only.
